name_en: Original Fendi iconic Baguette medium handbag, grey canvas material, embroidered with color-block yarn FF embossed pattern. Dark brown leather trim, adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic snap, internal compartment, zip pocket, and vintage gold hardware. Bag comes with removable handle and shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*15*6cm🐝🐝600M75
